---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

**Is your feature related to a problem?**
A short description of the problem (e.g. "I want to run curiosity without web search").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches (e.g. config flag, new script).

**Additional context**
How this fits the roadmap (ROADMAP.md) or architecture (README_ARCHITECTURE.md) if relevant.
